# strides

**Instance Property**

Defines strides for spatial dimensions. Must be four numbers, one for each spatial dimension, fastest running index last.

## Declaration

```swift
var strides: [NSNumber] { get set }
```

## Discussion

Default value: `@[ @1, @1, @1, @1 ]`
